[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100 1
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0001000 1
4 0000100 1
5 0000110 2
6 0010110 3
7 0000101 2

01 10 0000000 a match 1 2
12 21 0001000 1 match 3
23 32 0000100 1 match 0 4
34 43 0000110 2 match 5
45 54 0010110 3 match 6
56 65 0000101 2 match 7
67 76 0000100 1 match 0 4
70 07 0000000 a match 1 2

02 20 1000000 1
13 31 0000010 1
24 42 0000100 1 match 0 4
35 53 0000111 3
46 64 0000100 1 match 0 4
57 75 0010110 3 match 6
60 06 0000001 1
71 17 0010010 2

03 30 0000001 1
14 41 0010010 2
25 52 1001100 3
36 63 0000101 2 match 7
47 74 0010110 3 match 6
50 05 1000001 2
61 16 0000000 a match 1 2
72 27 0000100 1 match 0 4

04 40 0000000 a match 1 2
15 51 0011010 3
26 62 0000100 1 match 0 4
37 73 0000110 2 match 5
